quests.title: First Steps
quests.description: Learn the basics of survival in VibeMMO by speaking with the Town Herald and defeating some zombies.

offer.text: The lands beyond the town are dangerous. Could you help me with something?
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: The Quartermaster has supplies you need, and there are zombies to the east. I need you to speak with the Quartermaster and defeat 3 zombies.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Wonderful! Speak with the Quartermaster first, then head east to kill zombies. Return to me when done.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Very well. Return if you change your mind.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

inProgress.text: You haven't finished yet. The Quartermaster is to the south, and zombies are to the east.
inProgress.speaker: Town Herald

complete.text: Excellent work, adventurer! You've proven yourself capable. Here is your reward.
complete.speaker: Town Herald

quests.title: Wolf Pelt Collection
quests.description: Collect wolf pelts from the wolves roaming the eastern forest.

offer.text: Back so soon? I could use more help.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: I need wolf pelts for the winter. The wolves are in the forest to the east. Bring me 5 pelts and I'll reward you.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Thank you! The wolves are in the eastern forest.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

inProgress.text: You still need more wolf pelts. They're in the eastern forest.
inProgress.speaker: Town Herald

complete.text: Perfect! These pelts will keep us warm. Here's your reward!
complete.speaker: Town Herald

quests.title: Explore the Ruins
quests.description: Visit the ancient ruins located in the northeastern part of the map.

offer.text: There's something I need located. Are you brave enough?
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: There are ancient ruins to the northeast. I need you to visit them and report back what you see.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Head northeast from town. The ruins are at coordinates (750, 250). Be careful!
offer.speaker: Town Herald

inProgress.text: Have you visited the ruins yet? They're at (750, 250) in the northeast.
inProgress.speaker: Town Herald

complete.text: You found them! Thank you for exploring. Here's some XP for your trouble.
complete.speaker: Town Herald

quests.title: Meet the Quartermaster
quests.description: Introduce yourself to the Town Quartermaster.

offer.text: Before you venture out, you should meet our Quartermaster. She has supplies you'll need.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: She's just south of me in town. You can't miss her!
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: She'll give you a warm welcome. Come back after you've spoken with her.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

inProgress.text: The Quartermaster is just south of me in town.
inProgress.speaker: Town Herald

complete.text: Wonderful! You're all set for your adventures. Good luck!
complete.speaker: Town Quartermaster

items.name: Wolf Pelt
items.description: A thick fur pelt from a wolf.
